attributionText: Demo tafseer fixture for adapter testing only. Not for production scholarly use.

book.title: NOOR Demo Tafseer Import Fixture
book.author: NOOR demo content team
book.description: A small non-production tafseer fixture used to test the NOOR tafseer importer contract.

entries.title: Beginning with mercy
entries.body: This demo entry shows how a tafseer passage can be mapped to a single ayah. It is fixture text for importer testing only.

entries.title: Praise, mercy, and accountability
entries.body: This demo entry shows how one tafseer passage can be mapped to a range of ayat. It is not approved production tafseer.

entries.title: Worship and guidance
entries.body: This demo entry keeps the route contract visible for future long-form tafseer imports and review workflows.
